name: doubao-storyboard-video
description: Create Doubao and Seedance storyboard packages, character reference sheets, storyboard boards, and segment prompts from a finished script.

interface.shortDescription: Turn scripts into Doubao storyboard production packs.
interface.longDescription: Split a finished short-drama script into generation-ready segments, create character reference sheets and cut stills, compose Chinese storyboard boards, and write aligned Doubao or Seedance prompts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Turn this finished short-drama script into a complete Doubao storyboard production pack.
